notices.author: PaperStream Admin
notices.message:
Thank you to all of you friends... Today you seriously followed the instructions of the Honorable Principal... Please maintain the same spirit in the next two days also... so that the prestige of the institution is maintained in front of the presenters coming from outside.

Both the boys and girls are requested to be present tomorrow at 2 pm and sit with them in the program so that they can enjoy the program while remaining disciplined.

Arrangements for refreshments have also been made for the students tomorrow.

Affectionately
notices.title: Notice By Yogi Sir
